description: Replay ledger events as a navigable, deterministic history layer.

effects.playable_result: Creates an interactable beacon whose color and interaction verb follow the event type.
Connects sequential public events into a ghost trail players can follow.
Applies a short ambient animation when a player inspects the event.

rules.reasoning_display: Show explicit deliberation summaries and public references only.

world_effects.completion: Following all beacons in an episode unlocks a replay badge.
world_effects.failure: No canonical history is changed; players may restart the projection.
world_effects.interaction: Inspect, follow, compare lineage, and replay outcome.
world_effects.spawn: A Chronicle Gate appears in the record's world.
